keyFeatures: Powerful, ultra-concentrated solvent cleaner, degreaser, and adhesive remover

fields.shortProductDescription: RuggedRed Cleaner & Degreaser is a heavy-duty, industrial-strength formula designed to tackle tough grease, oil, and grime in kitchens, garages, appliances, and more. Safe for stainless steel, countertops, grills, and heavy-use areas, it wipes away messes without streaks or sticky residue. Non-toxic, eco-friendly, and made in the USA, RuggedRed makes deep cleaning effortless.
fields.detailedProductDescription:
RuggedRed™ is a powerful, heavy-duty cleaner & degreaser concentrated for maximum grease-cutting strength. It is ideal for indoor and outdoor use in commercial, industrial, and residential settings. It is safe for use on most surfaces, including:
Appliances
Countertops
Tools
Equipment
Vents
Work areas and much more

Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, countertops, and appliances, this multi-surface cleaner works on stainless steel, tile, glass, and wood while leaving a streak-free shine. Plus, it’s non-toxic, eco-friendly, and proudly made in the USA.

fields.shortProductDescription: RuggedRed Glass Cleaner is the ultimate solution for crystal-clear surfaces. Designed to cut through smudges, dirt, and streaks effortlessly, this industrial-strength formula is safe for windows, mirrors, glass tabletops, and shower doors. Enjoy a streak-free shine with a non-toxic, eco-friendly formula that’s proudly made in the USA.
fields.detailedProductDescription:
RuggedRed™ is a powerful, heavy-duty, glass cleaner concentrated for maximum cleaning strength. Its strong yet safe formula* is ammonia-free and biodegradable. It is made to provide streak-free cleaning in Commercial, Industrial, and Residential facilities. It’s ideal for daily use to help clean, shine, brighten, and polish:
Windows
Mirrors
Glass tabletops
Chrome
Stainless steel
Other glass surfaces

keyFeatures: Patented technology stops odors at the source
Stops odors from: smoke, food, animals, humans, chemicals, & more
Ideal for offices, homes, bathrooms, trash bins, kitchens, commercial facilities, & vehicles
fields.shortProductDescription: Rugged Red Odor Remover doesn’t mess around—it wipes out stubborn stench from carpets, cars, and couches with a fast-acting, professional-strength formula. Forget masking; this technology neutralizes odors at their core. Safe for kids, pets, and your sanity, it leaves nothing but a crisp, clean finish.
fields.detailedProductDescription:
RuggedRed™ Professional Instant Odor Remover is an ultra-concentrated, fast-acting formula designed to eliminate unwanted odors instantly. Using patented technology, it neutralizes odors at the source rather than masking them. Made for use in Commercial, Industrial, and Residential facilities, this unscented formula is ideal for homes, offices, bathrooms, kitchens, trash bins, vehicles, and more. Effectively eliminates odors caused by:
Smoke
Food
Pets
Chemicals
Other common sources

fields.shortProductDescription: RuggedRed™ are ultra-large, heavy-duty wipes built for the messiest jobs. Designed for techs in automotive, manufacturing, machining, and shop environments, these towels deliver fast, effective cleanup—no water needed. Their triple-action design makes them ideal for removing grease, oil, tar, epoxies, sealants, paint, and more from hands, tools, and surfaces.
